project.name: krishi-sathi-ai
architecture_notes: Layering: app/ (thin routes) -> src/features/ (domain) -> src/shared/ (cross-cutting). Dependencies flow downward only.
Platform files: prefer *.web.ts and *.native.ts facades for storage/network; do not import native modules from shared/default files.
Quality gates: npm run lint + npm run typecheck + npm test must pass before claiming done.

definition_of_done: Code is in correct layer and imports use barrels (@/features/*, @/shared/*).
If user-facing copy changed: update both src/shared/i18n/locales/en.json and hi.json (parity test passes).
npm run lint passes.
npm run typecheck passes.
npm test passes.
If web-impacting: npx expo export -p web --output-dir /tmp/web-verify succeeds.

features.title: Onboarding flow
definition_of_done: New-user onboarding completes end-to-end on at least one platform (web or android).
Onboarding state persists via storage facade.
Tests cover core onboarding store logic (if modified).

features.title: Chat experience + message sending
definition_of_done: User can send a message and see it in the thread.
Errors are surfaced without crashing; retry works if applicable.
Domain logic changes have a unit test.

features.title: Agent routing (on-device vs backend)
definition_of_done: Routing selects on-device for supported intents when confidence is high and conditions allow.
Falls back to backend POST /api/v1/query when needed.
ApiError fallbackHint USE_ONDEVICE is handled gracefully.

features.title: On-device LLM (Gemma) abstraction
definition_of_done: No platform bundles import native-only modules on web.
EXPO_PUBLIC_USE_NATIVE_GEMMA toggles native backend correctly.
Basic smoke invocation works on supported platform (if native client used).

features.title: Mandi prices (bundled assets)
definition_of_done: Mandi screen renders and shows prices from bundled assets.
Filtering/search works (if present).
No web regressions (export check if touched).

features.title: Farmer digital twin cache + hook
definition_of_done: Twin loads and caches reliably via storage/db facade.
Cache invalidation behavior is defined and tested if changed.

features.title: Storage facades (db + secure)
definition_of_done: No direct imports of expo-sqlite or expo-secure-store from shared/default files.
Web fallback works (where applicable).
Any schema/storage change includes a minimal migration strategy.

features.title: Connectivity facade
definition_of_done: Web uses navigator.onLine path; native uses NetInfo via facade.
No direct NetInfo imports outside facade.

features.title: i18n + locale key parity
definition_of_done: All user-facing strings go through t('key').
en.json and hi.json stay in sync (parity test passes).
